page: Google Cloud Platform m2-ultramem-208 is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 208 vCPUs and 5888.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an x86_64 Intel Xeon processor running at 2.7 GHz, the system contains 104 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core. The architecture includes dedicated CPU allocation with 38 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and AES cryptography. This instance does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance and single-threaded tasks, such as gzip compression and bzip3 decompression, fall into the bottom 25% tier. However, multi-core CPU performance is in the top 10%, and the system achieves top-tier memory bandwidth for cached small blocks at 10166.66 GB/sec. Large block read and write memory bandwidth remain strong, placing in the top 25%. Redis SET operations show exceptional throughput, reaching 147.67 million operations per second, while static web serving throughput is also strong.

Given its massive memory footprint of 28.31 GB per core, this server offers high resource density for memory-bound workloads, though it represents a significant hardware investment compared to general-purpose instances. The lack of local storage requires external storage attachment. This instance is designed for large-scale in-memory databases, memory-intensive enterprise applications, and heavy multi-threaded workloads that can leverage its massive RAM capacity and high multi-core throughput.
description: Google Cloud Platform m2-ultramem-208 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server configured with 208 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs (104 physical cores) and 5888.0 GB of RAM. Running at 2.7 GHz, the processor features 38 MB of L3 cache and supports AVX-512 instructions. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks show weak single-core execution and single-threaded compression, but outstanding multi-core capacity and memory bandwidth, with cached small-block reads reaching 10166.66 GB/sec. Redis SET operations perform in the top 10% at 147.67 million operations per second. While single-threaded tasks are limited, the massive memory density of 28.31 GB per core makes this server highly efficient for large-scale in-memory databases and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform m2-ultramem-208 is a memory-optimized server with 208 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 5.75 TB of RAM, delivering top-tier multi-core performance and memory bandwidth for in-memory databases.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform m2-ultramem-208 features 208 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 5.75 TB of RAM, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring massive RAM capacity and exceptional multi-core throughput for enterprise in-memory workloads.
